name: agentcore
description: Deploy, operate, and migrate AI agents on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore. Harness-first migration from 15 coding assistants (Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, ...) to managed harnesses + Strands runtimes. Every command verified against the AgentCore CLI 0.22.0; includes a harness-first generator, IAM least-privilege templates, a pre-deploy checklist, and a boto3 invoke fallback.
